figures.caption: Figure 2: Plot shows the converging training and validation losses during the training of the KAN model.
Figure 3: Plot shows the true and predicted long-term prediction of lumped battery temperature, measured at the surface.
Figure 1: Overview of the data-driven pipeline used for discovering the functional relationship between battery degradation and battery cycle number.

Figure 5: The top plot shows the error in SoHp estimations, and the bottom plot compares the estimation error distribution using boxplots for B-spline, quadratic, cubic, and quartic-based A2(k) representations.

Figure 4: Plot shows the baseline and three estimated SoHp. The true SoHp is calculated using the drop in resistance. The SoHp estimations are calculated from B-spline, quadratic, cubic, and quartic-based A2(k) representation.
